title: [DEPRECATED] Stronger Crossbows
description:
This datapack/mod buffs arrows fired from crossbows.
They are now around the equivalent of ~Power 4 bow arrows by default.
body:
[DEPRECATED] THIS PROJECT IS DEPRECATED AND WILL NO LONGER RECEIVE UPDATES OR SUPPORT.

# Stronger Crossbows
This datapack aims to make Crossbows more viable, from early game to late game.

Crossbow's arrows now almost have equivalent damage to that of a Power 4 Bow by default without enchantments. 

This balances out due to the crossbow being unable to recieve power, flame, infinity, etc. And it's slower charge-up without Quick-Charge.

For support or questions, join our discord server! [https://discord.gg/6YXSnQw8Uf](https://discord.gg/6YXSnQw8Uf)

This damage buff also effects mobs that use crossbow (eg. Pillagers, Piglins)
